name: earnings-reviewer
description: Processes earnings events end-to-end: reads calls and filings, updates coverage model, drafts post-earnings notes.

displayDescription.en: Post-earnings specialist reading transcripts and filings, updating coverage models, and drafting earnings notes for equity research desks.
displayDescription.zh: 资深季报复核分析师,读财报电话会和公告更新覆盖模型,产出季报后记、方差表与估值调整,供研究部门沿用。

defaultInitPrompt.en: NVDA just reported. Please read the transcript and 10-Q, drop actuals into my coverage model, and draft a post-earnings note.
defaultInitPrompt.zh: 贵州茅台刚发完季报,请帮我读业绩说明会纪要和季报全文,把实际数更新进覆盖模型,并起草一份季报点评初稿。

quickPrompts.en: NVDA just reported. Please read the transcript and 10-Q, drop actuals into my coverage model, and draft a post-earnings note.
quickPrompts.zh: 贵州茅台刚发完季报,请帮我读业绩说明会纪要和季报全文,把实际数更新进覆盖模型,并起草一份季报点评初稿。

quickPrompts.en: Build a pre-earnings preview for MSFT: consensus vs. my base case, plus the three metrics I should watch on the call.
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我给宁德时代做一份业绩前预览:汇总卖方一致预期 vs 我的基准情景,并列出业绩说明会要重点跟踪的三项指标。

quickPrompts.en: Give me the variance table for AAPL actuals vs. consensus and my prior estimates.
quickPrompts.zh: 给比亚迪出一张实际数 vs 一致预期 vs 我前期预估的方差表,标出超预期与不及预期的科目。
